assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 18-19 contain '## Code Intelligence' and line 20 states 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' with an example call on lines 25-29.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 31 contains '### Limitations' which appears after the '## Code Intelligence' section (line 18), making it a subsection of Code Intelligence.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 9 heading '## Serena Instances Discovered' followed by line 10 'Parsed MCP tool names matching the pattern `mcp__<instance>__<tool>` from the tools listing.' Line 12: '1. **serena_backend** -- discovered from tools prefixed with `mcp__serena_backend__`' and line 16: '2. **serena_ui** -- discovered from tools prefixed with `mcp__serena_ui__`'. Both discovered from MCP tool listing per line 5.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all sections were newly added (no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lines 3-9 contain a '## Preserved (from existing CLAUDE.md)' section that explicitly lists preserved content: '# my-project', '## Documentation', and '## Getting Started'. This contradicts the assertion that all sections were newly added with no preserved entries. While the Project Configuration section was newly added (lines 15-30), the log indicates existing content was preserved, not a pure greenfield setup.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 5 contains the table header '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' with exactly those four columns in that order.
